title: wolftpm-tss: create crate skeleton
description:
Create the wolftpm-tss crate with Cargo.toml, lib.rs, and workspace registration. No logic yet.

## What
- wolftpm-tss/Cargo.toml
  - depends on wolftpm-sys (direct dep for DEP_WOLFTPM_SRC_* metadata)
  - depends on tpm2-rs-client = { git = ... } or pinned crates.io 0.1.0
  - features: linux-dev, swtpm (propagate to wolftpm-sys)
- wolftpm-tss/src/lib.rs — module stubs
- wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs — placeholder WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm structs
- wolftpm-tss/README.md — what/why/how
- Add wolftpm-tss to workspace Cargo.toml members

## Design note
wolftpm-tss does NOT use WOLFTPM2_NO_WOLFCRYPT — it needs the full TPM2_CTX definition including the ioCb field to call the transport callback directly. This means wolftpm-tss has its own bindgen invocation or reuses wolftpm-sys with the flag removed for this crate.
